title: Add final local MLX NovelStack stack
body:
## Summary
- add finalized local MLX NovelStack overlay trainer
- add one-command run script for the final stack
- add concise final-stack doc with current observed local metrics

## Included files
- `code/train_gpt_mlx_novelstack.py`
- `code/run_best_novelstack.sh`
- `docs/novelstack/FINAL_STACK.md`

## Notes
- this PR intentionally contains only the final stack files
